scripts.build:firefox: rspack build --env target=firefox --env production=true && node scripts/patch-runtime.js dist/firefox/newtab.js
scripts.build:chrome: rspack build --env target=chrome --env production=true && node scripts/patch-runtime.js dist/chrome/newtab.js
scripts.build:chrome-store: rspack build --env target=chrome --env production=true --env store=true && node scripts/patch-runtime.js dist/chrome-store/newtab.js
